stemHtml: During a take-off in a Performance class A aircraft, you will need to apply more than 15 degrees of bank. The required vertical obstacle clearance margin...

options.a: is unaffected so long as the aircraft has passed 100 ft after take-off.
options.b: is increased from 15 ft (wet) to 35 ft.
options.c: is increased from 35 ft to 50 ft.
